title: World's Largest AI Model Repository Hugging Face Breached by Autonomous AI Agent

title: SleeperGem Uses Three Malicious RubyGems Packages to Target Developer Machines
raw_text: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new software supply chain attack codenamed SleeperGem targeting the Ruby ecosystem after three malicious gems were published to RubyGems with the end goal of serving additional payloads. The rogue gems are listed below - git_credential_manager (versions 2.8.0, 2.8.1, 2.8.2, 2.8.3) - Published on July 18, 2026 Dendreo (versions 1.1.3, 1.1.4) -
summary: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new software supply chain attack codenamed SleeperGem targeting the Ruby ecosystem after three malicious gems were published to RubyGems with the end goal of serving additional payloads. title: Critical NGINX Vulnerability Can Crash Workers and May Allow Remote Code Execution
raw_text: F5 has shipped fixes for a critical nginx flaw that lets a remote, unauthenticated attacker trigger a heap buffer overflow in the worker process with crafted HTTP requests. CVE-2026-42533 was patched on July 15 in nginx 1.30.4 (stable) and 1.31.3 (mainline), and in NGINX Plus 37.0.3.1; anyone on an earlier build should upgrade. Triggering it can crash or restart the worker, causing a denial of

title: More alerts are making your team slower, and an outcome-based SOC fixes that
raw_text: In this Help Net Security video, Thom Langford, EMEA CTO, Rapid7, explains why piling on more security alerts makes a SOC slower to respond. Attackers log in with stolen credentials and use trusted tools like PowerShell instead of custom malware. He shares a case where attackers called a help desk, reset a privileged cloud account, and exposed thousands of passwords in three minutes. Ransomware groups can go from access to payload in under three hours. … More → The post More alerts are making your team slower, and an outcome-based SOC fixes that appeared first on Help Net Security .
summary: In this Help Net Security video, Thom Langford, EMEA CTO, Rapid7, explains why piling on more security alerts makes a SOC slower to respond. Attackers log in with stolen credentials and use trusted tools like PowerShell instead of custom malware. He shares a case where attackers called a help desk, reset a privileged cloud account, and exposed thousands of passwords in three minutes. Ransomware groups can go from access to payload in under three hours.

title: A forensic tool for backdoored code completions in AI assistants
raw_text: Developers lean on AI coding assistants for a growing share of their daily work, letting the tools predict the next few lines and accepting many suggestions with a quick glance. Those tools learn from large collections of code, and some of that code can be tampered with before training starts. A poisoned example teaches a model to write insecure code when it sees a certain cue, and the flaw sits quietly until the right prompt … More → The post A forensic tool for backdoored code completions in AI assistants appeared first on Help Net Security .

title: WePlay Teams Up with Emirati Animated IP Freej for a Middle East Neighborhood Adventure
raw_text: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates, July 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WePlay, a social entertainment app for young users worldwide, has teamed up with Freej, the Emirati animated IP, to create a themed in-app experience inspired by Dubai neighborhood culture, local storytelling, and online adventure. Centered on a "Golden Realm" journey, the collaboration brings themed towns, bazaar-style scenes, character interactions, virtual gifts, avatar accessories, and room effects into WePlay's online social spaces.
summary: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates, July 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WePlay, a social entertainment app for young users worldwide, has teamed up with Freej, the Emirati animated IP, to create a themed in-app experience inspired by Dubai neighborhood culture, local storytelling, and online adventure. Centered on a "Golden Realm" journey, the collaboration brings themed towns, bazaar-style scenes, character interactions, virtual gifts, avatar accessories, and room effects into WePlay's online social spaces.

title: تعاونت WePlay مع العلامة الكرتونية الإماراتية الشهيرة "فريج" لتقديم تجربة مغامرات مستوحاة من أحياء الشرق الأوسط
raw_text: دبي، الإمارات العربية المتحدة, July 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- في إطار شراكة مميزة تجمع بين WePlay و«فريج»، الشخصية الكرتونية الإماراتية المحبوبة، تطلق منصة الترفيه الاجتماعي WePlay، الموجهة للشباب حول العالم والمتميزة بألعابها التفاعلية متعددة اللاعبين وتجاربها الاجتماعية الخفيفة عبر الإنترنت، فعالية مشتركة تستلهم ثقافة أحياء دبي وقصص شخصياتها وروح المغامرة. وتتمحور هذه التجربة حول «مغامرة أرض الذهب»، حيث يكتشف المستخدمون داخل التطبيق بلدةً وسوقًا ومشاهد استكشافية مصممة خصيصًا للحدث، لينطلقوا برفقة شخصيات «فريج» وشخصيات WePlay في فضاء اجتماعي رقمي يزخر بأجواء ضوء القمر والألغاز وروح المغامرة.

title: Bitget משיקה חשבון מאוחד חוצה-נכסים ראשון מסוגו בתעשייה, המאפשר שימוש ב-100 אסימוני מניות אמריקאיות כבטוחה
raw_text: ויקטוריה, סיישל, July 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Bitge t , הבורסה האוניברסלית ( UEX ) הגדולה בעולם , השיקה את החשבון המאוחד הראשון לנכסים חוצי נכסים (UTA) בתעשייה, שמביאה למעלה מ-370 נכסים זכאים — כולל 100 אסימוני מניות אמריקאיים ( rTokens ) — למאגר מרווחים אחד. ההשקה מרחיבה את המרווח המאוחד מעבר לקריפטו גרפיה , ומאפשרת ל אסימוני מניות לפעול לצד נכסים דיגיטליים בתוך חשבון אחד.

title: Bitget lance le premier compte unifié multi-actifs du secteur, avec une marge de 100 jetons d’actions américaines
raw_text: VICTORIA, Seychelles, 18 juill. 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Bitget , la plus grande bourse universelle (UEX) au monde, vient de lancer le premier compte de trading unifié multi-actifs (UTA) du secteur, regroupant plus de 370 actifs éligibles, dont 100 actions américaines tokenisées (rTokens), au sein d’un pool de marge unique. Ce lancement étend le système de marge unique au-delà des cryptomonnaies, permettant ainsi aux actions tokenisées de coexister avec les actifs numériques au sein d’un même compte.

Ce lancement étend le système de marge unique au-delà des cryptomonnaies, permettant ainsi aux actions tokenisées de coexister avec les actifs numériques au sein d’un même compte.
